channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: SpaceX reveals larger-than-expected Bitcoin holdings in IPO filing
item.description: SpaceX is expected to go public next month, which would make its 18,712 Bitcoin holdings rank seventh among public companies.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
item.description: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
item.description: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
item.description: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite spot BTC ETF outflows topping $2B
item.description: Bitcoin finds footing above $77,000 despite investors’ worry over BigTech earnings results and billion-dollar outflows from the BTC ETFs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
item.description: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Rakesh Upadhyay

item.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
item.description: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
item.description: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin sees fresh US sell-off as markets await Nvidia 'biggest earnings event'
item.description: Bitcoin struggles to overcome US selling pressure with markets on edge ahead of Nvidia's Q1 earnings report.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
item.description: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
item.description: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
item.description: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
item.description: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
item.description: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches
item.description: MAS found deficiencies in Bsquared’s risk management and conflict-of-interest policies, and that the firm had provided false or misleading information to the regulator on multiple occasions.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin’s momentum is fading: Traders have these support levels in mind
item.description: Bitcoin momentum is fading following drop to $76,000 as analysts warn a loss of key support at $74,000-$76,000 could trigger a deeper BTC price correction.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: South Carolina governor signs bill protecting Bitcoin miners, banning CBDC
item.description: Senate Bill 163 bans CBDC payments by state agencies and shields Bitcoin miners from discriminatory zoning and licensing rules.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
item.description: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: OpenAI launches overseas AI lab in Singapore with $234M commitment
item.description: OpenAI is opening its first overseas applied AI lab in Singapore through a $234 million partnership expected to create more than 200 technical roles.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitwise calls HYPE ‘most mispriced’ crypto despite 77% rise this year
item.description: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says Hyperliquid’s token is not priced as if it is tied to a “global super-app,” arguing the platform is more than just a crypto platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Trump orders review of fintech firms' access to Fed payment services
item.description: Financial regulators are also asked to review regulations that could be amended to streamline applications for eligible fintech firms seeking bank and credit union charters.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: GitHub investigates unauthorized access to internal repositories
item.description: GitHub said the activity involved the exfiltration of about 3,800 internal repositories, and it removed the malicious code extension.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Meta begins 8K global job cuts, starting in Singapore
item.description: Approximately 49,000 workers were laid off in 2026 as companies adopted a more AI-reliant business model.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: MoneyGram deepens blockchain payments push via Tempo partnership
item.description: The remittance company partnered with Stripe-incubated blockchain Tempo to support stablecoin settlement and help validate transactions across its global payments network.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s Iran war powers
item.description: “Congress has the power to slam the brakes on this unwise conflict,” said bill sponsor and Democratic Senator Tim Kaine.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: WLFI-linked AI Financial flags ‘going concern’ as losses mount
item.description: AI Financial Corp. posted a net loss of $271.5 million in the first quarter of 2026 as it flagged significant doubt about its ability to continue operating for the next 12 months.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Bankr temporarily disables transactions after 14 wallets hacked
item.description: Bankr recommends that affected users create a new wallet, generate a new seed phrase on a clean device and revoke approvals if remaining assets can’t be moved.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Trump-backed Truth Social pulls bids for crypto ETFs
item.description: The crypto ETFs were intended to be part of Trump Media & Technology Group’s broader crypto strategy, which included the launch of the Truth.fi financial platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea
